entry.title: Re: Control Editability of benefits based on the benefit...
entry.content:
We have improved the Benefits RBP so that customers can specify whether an employee or an administrator can enroll in benefits. However, it does not support at the benefit level, so if RBP is configured for admin to enroll or edit, it applies to all benefits; it cannot be configured for a subset of benefits.

As a workaround, the customer can use the following condition in the eligibility rule. This will prevent employees from enrolling in such benefits, however, once enrolled, the benefit will be visible to the employee, as will the Edit icon. But the system will not allow users to edit, only administrators can edit. Please check to see if this is feasible, and request that the customer test all of their use cases if they decide to follow this rule.

entry.title: Re: Post a 501 movement type using BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE
entry.content:
Hello @chris_mowl 

The 501 movement type is receipt from a vendor without a reference to a purchase order. Thus don't fill MOVE_* fields - they are for transfer postings. Fill MATERIAL, PLANT, STGE_LOC instead and VENDOR.

Also read the documentation to BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Clean code checks for ABAP – Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Hi @OlgaDolinskaja ,
I get the following,


This is a TDD system. 

Thanks
Aman

entry.title: Notification Error / Stop Automatic Event Mesh - S/4
entry.content: We currently have an issue with Event Mash. We are using the standard execution parameters, but at times it automatically turns off, interrupting the processes of sending integration to BTP/CPI and we do not receive any alert/notification of the problem, We need to understand the reason for the interruption and if there is a standard notification solution, in case this problem occurs

entry.title: Script in SAP BPC Embedded
entry.content: Hi Team, Is there any step by step process is there to create the Script in SAP BPC Embedded.

entry.title: Re: Currency conversion not working for 'Planner Currency...
entry.content:
I quickly found my own answer, as there was only a conversion table for the functional to the local currency's and no conversion for other currencies.

I have now added the conversion for GBP to CHF and it worked.

entry.title: Mont.IRF para PCC está igual a zero mas apenas em alguns documentos
entry.content:
Estamos utilizando o código de impostos GA(Geral no Pagamento - Acumulado) o mesmo esta configurado para pegar o valor da nota fical, porém em alguns casos o campo Mont.IRF esta ficando zerado.

 Este imposto esta configurado da seguinte maneira:

entry.title: Replacing of Parent Material with Material Variant in Multi-level BOM in AVC
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

What are the settings required to replace the parent material with material variant in multi-level BOM?

We have one Finished Material (FG) (Configurable Material) for which I have created the Sales BOM and Configuration Profile. Under this Sales BOM we have 2 Materials (A and B). Material A is having two Variants A1 and A2. When we enter the FG in sales order and selects required characteristics system is not replacing the A to A1. Can someone help me how should I proceed further? 

 

Thank you,

Krushikesh

entry.title: Re: From eDocument Cockpit to Manage Electronic Documents: Better user experience, more powerful fea
entry.content:
Hi,

Thanks for the nice blog.
But I'm missing a important feature from EDOC_COCKPIT in the native Fiori app 'Manage Electronic Documents' :

With the <Help> button in EDOC_COCKPIT, you get a detailed overview and explanation of the different User Actions and different Process Statuses.  This last one is important for troubleshooting.

Where can I find this in app Manage Electronic Documents?

entry.title: Re: Automating Schema Name Management in CI/CD for CAP Ap...
entry.content:
Thank you for your answer. We tried with below approach and it worked. This might also be another solution.

.hdbsynonymconfig(db/cfg folder)

{
"com.sap::SYNONYM_NAME": {
"target": {
"object": "COM_CHS_ZCOM_DEMO",
"schema.configure": "ServiceName_1/schema"
}
}
}

Schema name will be taken from "schema" property of "sample-db-hdi" service instance.
This blog helped us here, https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/how-to-share-tables-across-different-cap-projects/ba-p/13497184 
Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Taking Groups to the Next Level with Application-Specific Groups
entry.content:
Thanks for the blog.

Have implemented it in my setup, but the Application Name is not updated. 

Situation. 

MS Entra was already present. Created the application MS entra. copied that id

Added the property ips.application.id to the source system. Btw ips.application.id was not in the dropdown list.

 

Added the section to the transformation 

"group": {
"ignore": false,
"mappings": [
{
"targetPath": "$.schemas[0]",
"constant": "urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:core:2.0:Group"
},
{
"targetPath": "$['urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:sap:2.0:Group']['applicationId']",
"condition": "'%ips.application.id%' !== 'null'",
"constant": "%ips.application.id%"
},
{
"sourcePath": "$['urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:sap:2.0:Group']['type']",
"targetPath": "$['urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:sap:2.0:Group']['type']",
"optional": true
},
{
"sourcePath": "$['urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:sap:2.0:Group']['supportedOperations']",
"targetPath": "$['urn:ietf:params:scim:schemas:extension:sap:2.0:Group']['supportedOperations']",
"optional": true
},
{
"sourcePath": "$.id",
"targetVariable": "entityIdSourceSystem"
},
{
"sourcePath": "$.mailNickname",
"targetPath": "$.externalId",
"optional": true
},
{
"sourcePath": "$.displayName",
"targetPath": "$.displayName"
},
{
"sourcePath": "$.members",
"targetPath": "$.members",
"optional": true,
"preserveArrayWithSingleElement": true
},
{
"targetPath": "$.members[*].id",
"constant": "value",
"optional": true,
"type": "rename"
}
]
}
}

 

Ran a job but nothing gets updated. Created a new group, ran job, still no application updated

 

Any ideas why?

entry.title: ABAP CDS Enum declaration and accessing values
entry.content:
I am trying to find how to access the Values from Enum in ABAP using the following example.

I have declared the following Enum

@EndUserText.label: 'Enum Value'
define type ze_testenum : abap.char(8) enum
{
  UNKNOWN = initial;
  Sun     = '7';
  Mon     = '1';
  Tue     = '2';
  Wed     = '3';
  Thu     = '4';
  Fri     = '5';
  Sat     = '6';
}

Next, I defined the following View Entity

define view entity ZI_TestEnum
  as select from I_CalendarDate
{
  key CalendarDate,
      ze_testenum.#Sun as Word
}
where
  CalendarDate = $session.system_date

The output of the CDS is

Next, I updated the View definition to:

define view entity ZI_TestEnum
  as select from I_CalendarDate
{
  key CalendarDate,
      ze_testenum.#Sun as Word,
      cast(ze_testenum.#Sun as abap.char(8)) as Word2
}
where
  CalendarDate = $session.system_date

The output of this CDS is:

Next, I tried to use the same method in ABAP using the following class

class zcl_je_test definition
  public
  final
  create public .

  public section.
    interfaces if_oo_adt_classrun.
  protected section.
  private section.
endclass.

class zcl_je_test implementation.
  method if_oo_adt_classrun~main.
    out->write( ze_testenum-mon ).
    out->write( conv string( ze_testenum-mon ) ).
  endmethod.
endclass.

Output of this class is:

Here in ABAP, casting doesn't convert the value of Mon to 1 unlike in CDS View definition. Why this difference in behavior?

I added the following statement in the Class

out->write( conv ze_testenum( '1' ) ).

Now the output of the class is

I tried the same in CDS view definition by adding the following statement

cast('2' as ze_testenum) as Word3

The output of CDS now is 

In summary, I am able to:

  1. Print/Output Enumerated Constant Name in both ABAP & CDS
  2. Convert Value to Constant Name in both ABAP & CDS
  3. Convert Constant Name to Value in CDS by Casting, whereas Casting in ABAP code doesn't convert the value

Question(1) : Is casting the correct method to access the defined fixed values (Enumerated Values) from the CDS?

Question (2): How do I convert Constant Name to Value in ABAP code?

Tagging blog owner here for better reach @AndreaUS

entry.title: Re: Link date to datefrom and dateto in calculation view
entry.content: Hi Kristian,

entry.title: Re: Link date to datefrom and dateto in calculation view
entry.content: it took a little bit, but now it works. Thank you very much!!!! 🙂

entry.title: disp-work, Dispatcher, GRAY, Stopped, , ,10102
entry.content:
Can someone pls help me with the analyzation of this.

Database and Applicationserver are on the same host. OS is SUSE Linux.

I added the files dev_disp and dev_w0 to this post. My Server worked last week without any issues.

entry.title: Re: Using the Datasphere OData API with SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Digging up this blog while trying to create import connections in SAC for a handful of Datasphere views... I have the same questions as sarthaksrivasta. Do we need separate connections for each invididual view that we need to import? Or is it possible to use a single OData connection to access more than one view in a single space in Datasphere?

If we were building our own client to use the OData API, we would be able to use the catalog endpoint to dynamically retrieve the assetRelationalDataUrl for each object we wish to import data from, but that logic doesn't appear to be possible within a connection in SAC.

entry.title: Re: How and where do you start a consulting career in SAP?
entry.content:
Hi, @David_Chaviano David and everyone!

I hope this message finds you well! My name is Koppany. I've decided to continue my career as an SAP consultant. I'm not making it the classical way because I have 15 years of work experience as a middle manager.

During this time, I have frequently encountered situations where even companies with over 100 years of experience can be shaken by a chain of poor decisions based on faulty information. These experiences motivate me. I have several years of experience with SAP. However, to make it easier to take the first step and join a trainee program, and to improve my chances in the selection process, I have obtained the C_IEE2E, C_TS410, and C_S4EWM certifications. I have a background in logistics, manufacturing, and network management. Unfortunately, I have not yet been successful in joining any trainee program. Do you have any advice on how I could earn additional points in the selection process?

Additional information: I live in Austria and speak English, German, and Hungarian.

Thank you in advance for your response! Have a nice day!
Koppány

entry.title: The Art and Science of CAP (part 7) with Daniel Hutzel
entry.content:
Back by popular demand! We join Daniel Hutzel again as he continues on his exploration of The Art and Science of CAP, sharing insights and ideas from the origins, philosophy and magic of the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model. #SAPCAP #TASC

See the blog post The Art and Science of CAP for all details, notes, previous episodes, links and more.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Apps in Minutes using RAP framework/generator
entry.content:
Nice blog!

Is it possible to use the generator on standard tables where you cant´t insert the fields 

local_last_changed_at and last_changed_at?

 

Thanks

entry.title: SYSTEM VARIABLES IN PLD
entry.content:
Good afternoon Experts,

We have the following scenario: we are trying to add the field OJDT.NUMBER from the Journal Entry module to the PLD "INVENTORY POSTING LIST" in the "REPETITIVE AREA."

However, when we add it, the system does not display anything in the repetitive area. We have searched through SAP Notes and SAP Help for any information, but we have not found any relationship or relevant information.

We considered using System Variable 78 (Transaction Number), which appears in the native PLD "TRANSACTION JOURNAL," but it also does not appear when added.

Our query is as follows:

  • Is it possible to add this field to the PLD "INVENTORY POSTING LIST" in the "REPETITIVE AREA"?
  • Or is there some kind of restriction?

SAP Business One

entry.title: Re: proceso de cierre de las cuentas de P&g
entry.content:
Hola,

Muchas gracias por su pregunta.

¿Puede verificar si esta es la información que está buscando?

Operaciones de cierre

Saludos,

Henrike

entry.title: Two Different Process Variants Business Rule not Triggering Accordingly to the Event Reasons
entry.content:
SAP SUCCESS FACTORS - OFFBOARDING 2.0

I am trying to configure a Business Rule to trigger each Process Variant according to specific Event Reasons.  The Processes are two : Voluntary and Involuntary / Due to Death.                                                                     

Take care that I have multiple Programs triggering differently for multiple Legal Entities.                                                 

Sometimes the Rule triggers only the Voluntary while others only the Involuntary and others not even the whole Offboarding Process. 

In which way must the rule be created?

Do I lack any kind of configuration, or something is set in the wrong way?

entry.title: Re: Health Monitoring with Cloud ALM - Custom Metrics for S/4 HANA private cloud Part 1 (Postman)
entry.content:
• @domaine_technicaloperatio: You didn't provide enough details.
  • @christoph67sva: you don't need a body, I did it as in the example you link. You might need to play a bit with the resolution and period parameters to make sure you are fetching values.

entry.title: Re: SAP CPQ 2.0 Document generation - dynamic template se...
entry.content:
Hi @Halser_T ,

what do you think by creating a custom table that contains the text for the attribute combinations. 

In the document template use the custom table tags with some logic using the 2 attributes to get the right text from this custom table.

Thanks,
Kai

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
I've been experiencing the errors @eloyfcamposm and @Kushal_Banerjee have reported.

Any tip would be highly appreciated.

Installation is OK, instance is UP, but it's not possible to work with the system.

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Get the menu to the top of Business Application Studio
entry.content: This is one of the first things I always do when setting up my BAS dev space.  Unfortunately this setting is only available at the User level which means it is saved in the browser cache.  If you clear your browser cache you will need to reset this value in BAS the next time and it explains why you see it get overwritten from time to time.

entry.title: Re: Issue with UTCTOLOCAL Function in Data Flows (SAP Dat...
entry.content: Hi Githen, Thanks for your response! Yeah, I tried using CURRENT_UTCDATE(), and it is working. However, my requirement is to adjust the date dynamically to US/Central time, ensuring it accounts for Daylight Saving Time changes accordingly. If you have any suggestions for handling this scenario, I’d greatly appreciate it! Best regards, Ganga

entry.title: When processing a payment request, I am prompted that the payment request is not set as the supplier
entry.content: #SAP S4HANA Cloud #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public #SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition#SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance；#1.After the payment application of accounts payable is approved, when making payment, you will be prompted that the payment request is not set as the supplier's special GL ID. What should I do?； 2.When processing a payment request, I am prompted that the payment request is not set as the supplier's special GL ID. What should I do?

entry.title: Re: Do we have Purchase Proposals in SAP S4 HANA Public C...
entry.content:
Hello @ashisherplogic8,

Besides the regular purchase requisitions, the MRP can also be used to create planned orders for in-house production and delivery schedules for scheduling agreements: Determining Procurement Proposals.

I would recommend exploring the production planning scope items (SAP Signavio Process Navigator -> 

SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition -> Manufacturing -> Production Planning), and functionality. For example: 
  • Planning Process
  • Material Requirements Planning (J44).

Hope this helps.

Arturo Montes de Oca

entry.title: Re: Narrow Results for Wildcard Search in WEBi
entry.content: The first time around I just concatenated them; [SHOW NAME] + [PASSWORDS] + [POINT OF CONTACTS], but if any one of those columns had empty values (not shown in table above), it would not return a result in the search.

entry.title: Re: Get the menu to the top of Business Application Studio
entry.content: My personal recommendation is to always try and make settings changes in the Remote tab in settings.  However, not all settings are available under Remote so some will need to be set at the User level.  This will store them within the dev space versus at the User level which is stored in the browser cache.

entry.title: Re: Payment block substitution Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for your question.

Can you please check whether this is the information you're looking for?

Rules for Substitution/Validation

Kind regards,

Henrike

entry.title: SAP SF LMS
entry.content:
Dear Team 

Incorrect Learning Assign Date stored in SuccessFactors Learning - Time Zone management.

As LMS assignment date is shown wrongly (I assigned some training to a employee on 02.01.2025 but it shows as if i have assigned it on 01.01.2025)

Could you please kindly let me know if anyone had the same issue and how it solved.

Thanks

Peri

entry.title: SAP SF Learning - If someone is marked No Show could an email be sent to the supervisor?
entry.content:
I am the admin for "SAP SuccessFactors Learning" for our company (Consumers Energy aka "CE").

Is it possible to create an automated email for the LMS based on completion status for a Classroom Item?

For example, if someone is marked "No Show" for a Classroom Item, could an email notification be sent to the supervisor, and if so, what is the best way to go about that?

entry.title: Re: Inquiry About SAP Certification Digital Skill Initiative Coupon
entry.content:
Hello.

I also completed the steps on November before the deadline. I tried to ask about this too, but no answer yet.

For now, the only solution is to wait hoping that the initiative has not been abandoned.

entry.title: Commitment management for CO Module
entry.content:
Hi, my client wants to the setup and optimization of Commitment Management in the SAP CO module. 

They would like to properly track the future expenditures using standard SAP transactions and reports (e.g., KSB2, KOB2) to see open Purchase Order obligations broken down by cost center or internal order. The main objectives are:

  • Viewing the original PO amount vs. invoice receipts to determine what is still open.
  • Using reports such as S_ALR_87013623 (for cost centers) and S_ALR_87013019 (for internal orders) to gain insight into both posted costs and commitments (BANF/PO) at any given point.

    I have already checked the above-mentioned reports, but the data for open commitments (i.e., original PO amount minus already received invoices) is not displayed as expected. I need the support to:

    1. Ensure Commitment Management is fully active in our Controlling area.
    2. Configure/verify any necessary master data or system settings.
    3. Enable the relevant standard reporting transactions so we can see accurate commitment values (not just actuals)

entry.title: News from SAP Activate - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 and more
entry.content:
We are pleased to announce the availability of the updates to SAP Activate. This release significantly enhances the methodology guidance across a wide range of products and solution-specific content. These updates aim to streamline and improve the implementation process, providing a more seamless experience for our valued users. Here are the key highlights for this release. You can learn more in the detailed sections below:

  • SAP Activate Community Blogs and Activate Minute Videos
  • Updates to SAP Activate for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
  • Updates to SAP Activate Methodology for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition
  • Introducing SAP Activate for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - Upgrade
  • Updates to SAP Activate for Conversion of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2-system to 3-system landscape
  • Updates to SAP Activate for SAP SuccessFactors
  • SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Test Automation Tool 2502 Release

 

SAP Activate Community | SAP Activate Blogs | SAP Activate Minute Videos

Join the SAP Activate Community to explore valuable content and resources while connecting with SAP partners, clients and internal colleagues by participating in discussions and sharing knowledge.

Make sure to follow the SAP Activate tag to access blog posts like those highlighted here, along with additional insights shared by SAP Activate experts within the community.

Recap of some blog posts from the community:

  • 12 Things that SAP implementation methodology SAP Activate tells you to do by Jan Musil
  • Discover SAP Activate Tips in a Minute with SAP Activate Minute Videos by Christina Galbreath
  • SAP Activate road map viewer Now Accessible via SAP for Me by Chandan Gurav
  • How to Begin an SAP Activate for Transformation to SAP Cloud ALM Project by Bob Byrne
  • Optimize SAP Implementation with SAP Activate Methodology and Guided Implementation in Cloud ALM by Ana Goetz
  • SAP Activate for RISE with SAP: Roadmap Updates & New Content!  by Adi Kamugisha
  • Providing Feedback in SAP Activate road map viewer via SAP for Me by Adi Kamugisha
  • Check out the new SAP Activate one minute video, SAP Activate Parallel Line Roadmap.

 

Updates of SAP Activate for SAP S/HANA Cloud Public Edition in 2502

The SAP Activate for SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (3-system landscape) implementation roadmap has been enhanced based on product management input, system functionality changes, and customer feedback. Below are highlights for this release.

  • Updates to several tasks in the Project Management workstream and associated accelerators to refresh the procedures and content.
  • Reworked the Conduct Project Quality Gate tasks at the end of each phase. Updated the quality gate accelerator to prepare for the integration of the checklists into SAP Cloud ALM checklist functionality.
  • Added a new tag to easily identify deliverables and tasks associated with the GROW Adoption Plan.
  • Added two new tasks, Request Deployment Readiness Check for Upcoming Go-Live  and Review Business Processes with the CQC for Process Adoption Service, and updated task Request Knowledge Assessment to better support the services related to the continuous Quality Check program (CQC).
  • Added a new task Verify and Locate Provisioning Email from SAP. The task helps to ensure the Initial Admin locates and reviews the consolidated provisioning email from SAP once the request has been submitted via SAP For Me.
  • Migrated the Road Map viewer to the SAP for Me platform to provide a most consistent user experience with other sap support products. Renamed Roadmap Viewer to Road Map Viewer based on the recommendation from SAP One Voice.

GROW Adoption Plan

GROW Adoption Plan tag providing quick access to key adoption tasks

 

Updates of SAP Activate Methodology for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition

The SAP Activate Methodology content for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition continues to be enhanced to help guide the customer through the journey of a new implementation, system conversion, and selective data transition following the SAP Clean Core principles. These journeys are accessible by selecting the appropriate journey tag within the single roadmap in road map viewer or individually in SAP Cloud ALM.

Key highlights include:

  • In coordination with the Regional Implementation Group (RIG), several updates have been made in in the roadmaps pertaining to both System Conversion and Selective Data Transition.
  • For Extensibility in System Conversion Fit-to-Standard for Specific Features, User Experience Design and User Access and Security Planning and Design, new guidance and templates for managing functional specifications were added in the EXPLORE phase.
  • Updates have been made for all presentation guides for User Experience.
  • A new task, Review your Clean Core Assessment, for the Prepare, Explore, Realize, and Run phases under the deliverable Clean Core Quality Gate was added. This task provides guidelines for conducting a comprehensive review of the Clean Core Assessment to ensure alignment with Clean Core principles throughout the project activities.
  • Tasks pertaining to managing the SAP Business Network have been added including Self-Enable on SAP Business Network and Setup Integration for S/4 HANA System and SAP Business Network.

See the release notes for a complete list of all improvements.

 

Introducing SAP Activate for RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - Upgrade

This roadmap is designed to guide existing Private Cloud Edition customers (both direct and indirect) in transitioning to the latest release of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition. This enables customers to benefit from the latest innovations, including AI, enhance security and compliance, avoid costs associated with unnecessary custom code, and maximize the lifespan of their systems. As with the other RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition roadmaps, adherence to SAP Clean Core principles is embedded.

The content is already available in the SAP Activate road map viewer and SAP Cloud ALM.  Key pillars are:

Unleash Innovation

  • Increase productivity and improve business processes with advanced Business AI, automation and predictive analytics.
  • Enhance user experience and collaboration with Joule, SAP Fiori and Microsoft Teams integration.
  • Benefit from our continuous investment in business processes and integration technologies to facilitate the interaction in hybrid system environments.

Foster Security and Compliance

  • Stay secure with built-in cybersecurity and data protection based on the latest standards.
  • Improve risk and compliance transparency and always adhere to local and global regulations.
  • Respond to the latest compliance trends.
  • Prevent IT audits issue and be compliant with compatibility packs usage.

Build An Upgrade Routine

  • Optimize the upgrade strategy and benefit from greater flexibility and easier-to-consume innovation with the new release and maintenance strategy.
  • Lower upgrade impact by following SAP's clean core principles that make upgrades a seamless part of the software lifecycle by running on the latest release for regular adoption of innovation.
  • Upskill teams with the Enterprise Support Academy and dedicated SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition Value Maps.

Leverage Tools and Services

  • Assess the upgrade impact by running SAP Readiness Check.
  • Reduce efforts and improve quality using Test Automation.
  • Benefit from SAP support guidance and resources included with RISE subscription for the technical upgrade execution.
  • Leverage services and support from SAP and its ecosystem.

Links:

  • RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition – Upgrade
  • Upgrade Community Page
  • White Paper

SAP Activate for upgrading RISE SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition

 

Updates of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2-system landscape to 3-system landscape 

The following are recent updates to the content based on insights from customer conversion projects, feedback from internal stakeholders, and customer-like testing activities.

  • Refreshed guidance for planning, receiving, and confirming the Test Data Refresh service. All tasks have been updated, new checklist has been added to reflect the new process for planning the service, preparing for its delivery, and confirming the service results. (link)
  • Updated accelerator Delta Features 2-system landscape to 3-system landscape that details the new capabilities of the 3-system landscape solution. You can access it on this task. (link)
  • Added new accelerator SAP BTP Guidance Framework to task Develop and Transport Side-by-Side Extensions in the Run phase. (link)
  • Updated procedure notes in tasks Confirm Conversion Project Schedule in the Discover phase to make sure Solution Builder customers consider the impact of specific activities on their conversion project. (link)
  • Added a new task Activate Scope Item 5XU to Use Document and Reporting Compliance in the Realize phase to guide customers using Document and Reporting Compliance (DRC) features to create, process, and monitor electronic documents and statutory reports post-conversion. (link)
  • Updated task description and accelerators for Grant Access to Partner for Creating and Managing Cases in the Prepare phase. (link)

Refer to the methodology overview page in the SAP Activate road map viewer for the latest content updates and the overview video here. Additionally, bookmark the SAP Community page dedicated to conversion topics here.

 

Updates of SAP Activate for SAP SuccessFactors

The SAP Activate for SAP SuccessFactors roadmap has been enhanced based on product management input, system functionality changes, and customer feedback. Below are the highlights:

  • Updates to several tasks in the Project Management workstream and associated accelerators to refresh the procedures and content.
  • Task changes to improve results when combining with the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition road map in SAP Cloud ALM.

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Test Automation Tool 2502 Release

In the 2502 release of the Test Automation Tool for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition, we are enhancing the Post Upgrade Tests (PUT) with a new app and various improvements. Key highlights include:

  • The new Post Upgrade Test (PUT) app offers various dashboards that visualize key factors of PUT execution. Additional enhancements include:
    • One click navigation to all applications used in PUT.
    • The ability to compare results from two Post Upgrade Test (PUT) runs.
    • Enhanced contextual information for Trigger and Tracking PUT runs.
    • Consolidated of all PUT related actions in once place (Consent | Maintain | Roles | Trigger).
  • Improved analytics in the intelligent Test Scoper (i-TS) app provide overall and application area specific scope efficiency for the optimized scope.

For more details, refer to the blog on the 2502 features in the Test Automation Tool.

 

Run simple – SAP Activate – Accelerate and simplify the adoption of SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

Your SAP Activate Team

entry.title: S/4 OnPrem - Is Key User Extensibility "Clean Core" but not compatible with ABAP Cloud?
entry.content:
I just started a totally new development for a new project on S/4 2023 FPS 01. I'm trying to follow the Clean Core approach to the extreme so I created a new Software Component and the structure of packages in it, everything using "ABAP Cloud" version.

Then I decided that for certain changes I would use the Extensibility Apps. For example, I wanted to create a list of values (aka Domain) using the "Custom Reusable Elements" app. I already encountered some limitation since it doesn't allow to enter a "blank" value with a description. I also tried to use a custom field via the "Custom Fields" app to easily extend API's and other objects.

By default, my changes got assigned to a non-transportable package, so I tried to use the app "Register Extensions for Transport" to reassign it to a package from my initial setup inside my SC.

My package was not available there. But that's not a problem, first it needs to be added via the app Configure Software Packages. My packages appear in the dropdown menu only after I changed the new software component in SE06 which adds it to the table DLV_SYSTC... (I found out this by debugging). But even if the package is available, then the following error comes "Package ZXXXXX can't be used. It is configured for ABAP language version 5." And I see the "reusable lists" generate DDIC CDS for example.

Therefore, my question is: should I assume that Key User Extensibility is Clean Core (future proof) but at the same time not compatible with ABAP Cloud? How should I organize the packages and software components then?

entry.title: Address from Object Activity does not have detailed address information
entry.content:
For our SAP B1 linked databases address linked to an activity does not have detailed address informations.

F.e. the postal code is empty, because in SAP B1 the activity does not have that field.
But the information is available in BP addresses, Equipment Card etc. (in SAP B1).

Is there a way that those values will be added automatically? (perhaps a missing UDF in SAP B1) or a simple way to solve this?

We are using the HTML offline report and having issues by printing the correct address, because the HTML template is building the address based on ServiceCall.activities.[0].address.

Best regards,

Alex

entry.title: Re: Creating inbound delivery for the purchase order line...
entry.content:
If you have 5 line items and only 2 line items are relevant to inbound deliveries --here is an option that I think would work for you

Make sure on the confirmation tab-- the line items that are relevant to inbound delivery -- have the confirmation control key as inbound delivery -0004 -- the other 3 line items -- keep it blank -- that when you create inbound delivery --you get a warning but system will adopt only 2 lines that have 0004 confirmation control key

entry.title: Re: Implementing Automatic Account Determination with a Custom Field
entry.content:
Hi Tobias,

Thank you for sharing this nice document.

I have a similar requirement to add a custom field for 'Sourcing and Procurement' Area. I have created a custom field in 'Material Document' line item. But I am not able to identify the config. where I can add my custom field to reflect on Automatic Account Determination for Sourcing and Procurement (GBB, VBR). Can you please guide me on this?

Thanks & Regards,

Richa

entry.title: Re: Can we disable "Training Overdue Send Reminder" Popup...
entry.content: @JacobB, yes, there is. But the end result may not be the desired one. If the "Access Direct Reports" permission is deleted from the user's role, that pop-up goes away from the home page. However, that'll remove the "Send Reminder" option from the manager also from the "Team View" area.

entry.title: Second Integration Process Not Starting – "no interface action for sender/receiver found"
entry.content:
I am facing an issue in SAP PI 7.31 where a first integration process (ccBPM) runs successfully, but the subsequent (second) integration process does not start. The first process completes its message processing and hands it over to the Process Engine (PE), but the second process is not triggered.

I have configured the Receiver Determination to include the second integration process as a valid receiver. However, the transition does not seem to work. Interestingly, the same scenario with identical configurations worked perfectly in SAP PI 7.01, but after migrating to SAP PI 7.31, this issue started to occur.

Details of My Configuration:

  1. Sender Interface of the First Process:

    • The first process uses an asynchronous interface configured to handle message processing within a specific sender component. This sender component acts as the starting point for the first integration process and forwards the generated messages to the second process via the Process Engine. The interface is set up with the correct namespaces and communication channels to ensure proper processing of the message.

  2. Receiver Interface of the Second Process:

    • The second process is also configured with an asynchronous interface that acts as the endpoint for the messages sent by the first process. The configuration specifies that the messages from the first process should be received by the receiver component of the second process. The interface is set up in the Integration Directory, and the Receiver Determination includes the second integration process as the valid receiver. The goal is for the second process to start upon receiving the message and continue the processing accordingly.

Message Settings:

  • Quality of Service (QoS): Exactly Once (EO)
  • Pipeline: PE_ADAPTER
  • Message Type: Asynchronous

Error Messages and Logs: The following log entries indicate that no suitable action for the sender or receiver could be found:

<Trace level="1" type="T">--start of determination of sender interface action </Trace>
<Trace level="1" type="T">select interface MI_BPM_JobParameter_abs_async</Trace>
<Trace level="1" type="T">no interface action for sender found </Trace>
<Trace level="1" type="T">hence keep interface action INIT</Trace>
<Trace level="1" type="T">--end of determination of sender interface action </Trace>
<Trace level="1" type="T">--start of determination of receiver interface action </Trace>
<Trace level="1" type="T">number of receivers: 1</Trace>
<Trace level="1" type="T">receiver 1</Trace>
<Trace level="1" type="T">no action for receiver found </Trace>
<Trace level="1" type="T">no interface action for sender or receiver found </Trace>
<Trace level="1" type="T">hence set interface action to DEL</Trace>

 
 

Additionally, the log entry Starting async processing with pipeline CENTRAL shows that the message is handed over to the Process Engine, but the second process is not initiated. This Picture shows it. The Namespaces are the same and are also configured in both integration processes.


What could be causing the second integration process not to start, even though the message is successfully handed over to the Process Engine? What steps should I take to identify the root cause and resolve this issue?

entry.title: How to get Dynatrace API Token
entry.content:
Hi Team,


Please help us fetch API Details for below Multidimensional components or any other metrics from dynatrace.


1) Background Processing
2) CPI
3) AIS
4) API's
5) OCC


Also, if we can create dashboard for these views?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: gCTS is here
entry.content:
Hi,

there is no direct option to deliver UI5 code from a repository into an ABAP system without a build. So I have to say that there is no better way then working against the ABAP system or at least use WebIDE

Kind regards
Karin

entry.title: Re: How to get Dynatrace API Token
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

SAP Commerce Cloud uses a third-party monitoring tool called Dynatrace for observability, monitoring, and performance management. This solution is integrated with SAP support systems. Dynatrace provides full stack monitoring and visibility from the front end to the back end, to the infrastructure, or to customer cloud commerce environments.

You can check the below KBA's to follow up with getting API token, Dynatrace Documentation and creating Dashboards:

  • Connecting a Dynatrace Subscription to a Mobile App in SAP Commerce Cloud - openSAP Microlearning
  • How to Access Dynatrace - SAP Commerce Cloud
  • How to Create and Customize a Dashboard in Dynatrace- SAP Commerce
  • Performance Monitoring with Dynatrace - SAP Commerce Cloud
  • How to Generate Dynatrace API Tokens

 

Regards

entry.title: Re: Address from Object Activity does not have detailed a...
entry.content:
Hey Alex,

 

if I understood you correctly, you want to have the zipcode part of the address also available on activity level. This can be achieved with a UDF - we have a detailed explanation in the following KBA:

https://me.sap.com/notes/0003559808

I think that should cover your requirement.

 

Best regards,

 

Dmitry

entry.title: Calling Email destination from CAPM service using oAuth authentication
entry.content:
Hello Experts ,

as per the learning journey only basic authentication is supported while calling email destination in CAPM service ,is there any way Email destination with Oauth authentication can be called or except ny out of the box sdk library available to leverage here apart from mail client , please suggest .

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/develop-advanced-extensions-with-sap-cloud-sdk/sending-email-using-sap-cloud-sdk_fce16eb8-20d3-4bb0-b657-f96decf220eb

Thanks,

SAP Cloud SDK SAP Cloud Application Programming Model

entry.title: Re: Credit management related issues - update group change didn't exclude the previous value
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Adding Lean Service component in the maintenance task list
entry.content:
Hello all, 

I have configured lean services in the system, I can add it in a maintenance order for an operation. However, when I want to add it in the maintenance task list I cannot see the Item categories which were configured.

Can someone explain what could be the reason for this or am I missing something here?

Screenshots for reference:

1. Procurement mode is set to "Enhanced procurement mode" for my plant-order type combination.

2. PM/CS -> Maintenance and Service Processing -> Subcontracting for MRO process -> Define Item Categories

3. Configured Item categories not appearing in the "Services" Tab for Maintenance Tasklist:

4. But they are available in maintenance order operation

 

Is there something else I have to configure to get them in maintenance tasklist?

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: BADI for Journal entry item (Changing parameter: WBSE Element)
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Re: Migrate to new asset accounting within ECC
entry.content: Hi Vincent, We are also exploring this option currently. Did you get any addtiaonl deatils on this topic? Any learning you can share with us if you have already done this. Thanks Ankit Agarwal

entry.title: Re: Wrong conversion of amount to condition value in Purc...
entry.content:
Do you have an info record on this line - please check the price unit and price on the info record --your PBXX configuration is not the issue as it looks perfect as it should be.

 

Also check SAP Notes

886532 - Pricing: Display and rounding of numbers

153707 - Currency translation miscalculates by 100, 1000.

entry.title: Re: Master database creation failed for SAP ASE 16.0 SP03...
entry.content:
It looks like a) the srvbuildres process has moved past the SNAP-related issue and b) you've run into a new/separate issue.

The errorlog snippet you've posted consists of messages normally seen in a clean shutdown. If you're unable to find additional details earlier in the errorlog, and there's nothing useful in the srvbuildres output, I'd recommend opening a case with tech support.

entry.title: Optimized Design Experience as the default for the entire SAC tenant
entry.content:
Dear community,

the client wants to set the Optimized Design Experience as the default for the entire SAC tenant. Does anyone have experience with configuring this setting? If so, could you provide recommendations on the steps to be followed?

Thank you & Kind regards,

Victoria

entry.title: Re: SAP SF Learning - If someone is marked No Show could...
entry.content: @MichaelWright, as I understand the situation, it would be possible via the "ApmSupervisorLearningPlanNotification".

entry.title: Re: Equipment installation to Functional location does no...
entry.content:
I do not think installing the serialized equipment to the functional location will consume the material from the stock automatically. You have post goods issue manually as consumption needs to know which plant and sloc- qty etc. 

It is part of standard SAP you have to write custom logic or some batch program to perform goods issues to achieve this requirement.

entry.title: Re: Wrong conversion of amount to condition value in Purc...
entry.content: Thank you Sandeep, I will test this. This indicator is active, so we will try to deactivate it. I will keep you posted

entry.title: FG costing for projects with revenue - S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello, everyone,

I'm using projects with production.

I would like to know if it is possible to use the project costs to perform the costing of the finished product?

I have a sales order with the FG and is linked to the WBS at item level.

The production order is generated by the project requirements as described in scope item 6DG.

At the moment the system is only using the costs of the production order to determine the costing of the FG.

In this case it is a make-to-order product where there are many variations that cannot be taken into account in the production order. These variations are then allocated to the project, leading to costs that must be taken into account in the costing of the FG.

How should I proceed?

Thank you,

Best regards,

Rafael

entry.title: Re: Watch the Replays of Our Exclusive SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 Early Release Series!
entry.content:
Thanks.

Unfortunately, the extensibility session is not available as of today January 27th.

entry.title: Re: Clean code checks for ABAP – Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Hi @Amandeep ,

ok, then you should request a name space and install it in systems using the Maintain Namespaces app of the Landscape Portal for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, ABAP environment. See also the SAP Help documentation Maintain Namespaces for more details.

Kind Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: Re: Connection between SAP R/3 and Datasphere
entry.content: Hi Lothar, SAP help doesn't have any details on SAP R/3. That was the precheck performed before posting it here. If you have any details on R/3, please share. Thaks

entry.title: Payment term description
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Payment terms description is showing in german language in tax invoice print however in billing document header its showing in english. 

i have checked table tvzbt in that table payment terms in maintained in both languages german and english. 

Also i not able to see the print preview of the billing document.

Hi All,

Please kindly advise when the new SAP Note for RFHUDSP will be available (containing new legal requirement)? 

Thank you,

Bozena

entry.content: Is there any way we can use this in a table field? Is it possible to reduce the size to make it look like a textArea?

entry.title: Re: Problem to create inbound delivery in EWM first time
entry.content: Hello, could you find the cause of the problem?

entry.title: 🇦🇹 SAP CodeJam ABAP Cloud (Linz, Austria)
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is on the topic of the ABAP Cloud, and specifically introduces attendees to ABAP Cloud and the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model. ABAP Cloud is the ABAP based development model for S/4HANA Cloud, S/4HANA on premise, and SAP BTP, ABAP environment. Learn how to use proven and new technologies, such as Core Data Services (CDS) and behavior definition and implementation languages, to build SAP Fiori apps and OData services on any of the ABAP Cloud options. In this hands-on experience, developers will create their first ABAP applications using ABAP Cloud, expose and consume services via HTTP, and explore the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model.

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Monday 23 June 2025 in Linz, Austria  from 09:00 - 16:00 GMT+1. The language of the event and the content will be English. 

Location: TechCenter Hafenstraße 47-51 4020 Linz AUSTRIA

The instructor is Andre Fischer

Here are essential prerequisites that must be completed by every attendee, before arriving at the event location. They are documented here: abap-exercises-codejam/prerequisites.md at main · SAP-samples/abap-exercises-codejam (github.com).

The event is kindly being hosted by Develite IT Solutions, thank you! Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 25 attendees. Register here in the Community Event using the RSVP functionality.

For more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees, head over to the SAP CodeJam group.

entry.title: Re: Shemas in SAP HANA.
entry.content:
Hi

Excuse me, Is there a way to know which schemas a user has access to?

Regards!!!!

entry.title: Re: Advanced Returns Management for Supplier Returns
entry.content:
Hello Cherry, 

Thank you for the detailed blog very insightful.

I have one question though -"At the time of replacement PO creation system automatically creates IB Delivery, can we disable automatic IBD creation and instead get ASN from supplier for replacement PO and then create it? If yes, then how we can control that?

Thank you in Advance,

Vijay Sharma

entry.title: Re: Is There a Script Example for Exception Handling in O...
entry.content:
Hi,

Thanks, it worked for me, but I had to revert the code bellow

def odataException = ex.getCause();

to

def odataException = ex.getCause().getCause();

entry.title: Re: Fiori Apps in Minutes using RAP framework/generator
entry.content:
@JaAr 
Thank you!
No, it won't be possible without those mandatory admin fields.
You can try to add those fields using append structure and generate the repository objects but that won't be recommended as it will create a managed scenario, and the create, edit and delete will directly happen on the standard table which will generate inconsistency. 🙂

Regards,
Rajat

entry.title: Re: How to mass delete physical inventory documents on sa...
entry.content:
Hi,

 Currently, there is no option to mass delete the Physical Inventory documents in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. Please create a CIP request for this functionality. As an alternative option, consider utilizing IRPA with screen scrapping. 

Regards

Jai Srinivasan

entry.title: Re: SAP Script Uline(xxx) / horizontal line issue
entry.content: Loo at font definition in SAP (SE73) and check in Window : Settings app on your Windows device, select Personalization > Fonts

entry.title: Re: SAP Developer Challenge - SAP Community Escape House - UI5
entry.content: Great!

entry.title: Cancellation Invoice status is Release Discarded Instead of Released
entry.content:
Hello SAP-Support,

we encountered follow issue:
the release for the cancelled invoice was discarded.

the following steps were taken while cancelling the invoice:

1) searched for the invoice in "invoice documents" and pressed cancel
2) saved the cancellations
3) refreshed the "invoice documents" and SAP showed the result on the screenshot

The status of the cancellation invoice has to be "released". Right now we have no valid cancellation invoice.

Please resolve this issue, thank you very much in advance.

With kind regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Kyma APIRule v2alpha1: MaxAge default causing an error in Terraform
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm working to migrate my existing entries for APIRule v1beta1 to v2alpha1, and I've hit upon something that I think might be an issue with the default manifest coming from Terraform.

Below is my original version of the v1beta1 rule in our Terraform (since it's just a manifest it should map to the YAML directly):

resource "kubernetes_manifest" "api_gateway_seq" {
  depends_on = [
    kubernetes_namespace_v1.o11y, data.kubernetes_service_v1.grafana_service, kubernetes_namespace_v1.dns_management,
    kubernetes_manifest.istio_gateway
  ]
  for_each = local.gateways

  manifest = {
    apiVersion = "gateway.kyma-project.io/v1beta1"
    kind       = "APIRule"
    metadata = {
      name      = "seq-apigateway-https-${each.value.suffix}"
      namespace = kubernetes_namespace_v1.o11y.metadata[0].name
    }
    spec = {
      gateway = each.value.gateway
      host = "seq.${each.value.host}"
      service = {
        name = data.kubernetes_service_v1.seq.metadata[0].name
        port = 80
      }

      rules = [{
        path    = "/.*"
        methods = ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]
        accessStrategies = [{
          handler = "allow"
          config  = {}
        }]
      }]
    }
  }
}

And below are the modifications I've made to support v2alpha1 --

  • Updated "host" to "hosts" with an array of 1
  • Added namespace to service
  • Added noAuth = true
resource "kubernetes_manifest" "api_gateway_seq" {
  depends_on = [
    kubernetes_namespace_v1.o11y, data.kubernetes_service_v1.grafana_service, kubernetes_namespace_v1.dns_management,
    kubernetes_manifest.istio_gateway
  ]
  for_each = local.gateways # we have multiple gateways

  manifest = {
    apiVersion = "gateway.kyma-project.io/v2alpha1"
    kind       = "APIRule"
    metadata = {
      name      = "seq-apigateway-https-${each.value.suffix}"
      namespace = kubernetes_namespace_v1.o11y.metadata[0].name
    }
    spec = {
      gateway = each.value.gateway

      hosts = ["seq.${each.value.host}"]

      service = {
        name      = data.kubernetes_service_v1.seq.metadata[0].name
        namespace = data.kubernetes_service_v1.seq.metadata[0].namespace
        port      = 80
      }

      rules = [{
        path    = "/.*"
        methods = ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE"]
        noAuth  = true
      }]
    }
  }
}

 However, when I attempt to apply the Terraform, I see:

> AttributeName("maxAge"): can't use tftypes.String as tftypes.Number

I can't find any reference to maxAge in any default YAML files I've seen, but it does seem like it factors into corsPolicy.

Is there an appropriate default I should be moving to here? Or is this an issue with the standard resource definition?

entry.title: Re: Cancellation Invoice status is Release Discarded Inst...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

Hope all is well 

We could see that The Invoice Document was Not Released at the time it was cancelled. For this reason, it has turned to status Release Discarded.

Also, in this case, the Cancellation Invoice has the status Release Discarded as well.

The cancellation Invoice will only have the Released status if the Invoice Document is in status "Released" at the time of the cancelation.

This is the expected system behavior.

Best Regards,

Marcelo
SAP Product Support

entry.title: Re: FS Items and GL Account Mapping Table into SAC
entry.content: Sachin, Currently there is no way to expand the SAC table based on attribute relationship between 2 dimension. The current common approach has been to use fact data to create that bind relationship by posting 1 and then using booked option. There is an influence request already for this which mentions that we could get this feature somewhere in 2025 Q3 tentatively.

entry.title: Bem Vindos ao Grupo de Salvador da Comunidade SAP!
Aggregate the data respective field in Signal
entry.content:
Hello There,

There is a scenario like to display respective the events in Single line per each case.

Example:

Case01 Event1

Case01 Event2

Case01 Event3

Case02 Event4

Case02 Event3

Case04 Event1

Case04 Event4

Would like to display as below:

Case01 Event1,Event2,Event3,Event4

Case02 Event4,Event3

Case04 Event1,Event4

 

Please let me know , how to achieve as above.

Regards,

Shravan.

entry.title: Re: First steps to work with SAP Cloud ALM Deployment scenario for SAP ABAP systems (7.40 or higher)
entry.content:
@DoloresCorrea 

Thank you very much for the blog; it has been incredibly helpful.

I have a question regarding the replacement of the Production system.

We are not planning to release any transport from the DEV box.
Instead, we just want to create the TRs from CALM, since we can't use the virtual system in CALM.

Our plan is to set up a DEV - QA - sandbox environment (we aim to replace it when the PRD is available?)

Please let me know if it is possible to setup

Thank you for your assistance.

entry.title: Earmarked Funds with contracts
entry.content:
Hello,

I have the following issue for earmarked funds in relation with contracts.

When creating the contract (ME31K) within the contract the account assignment cat. is blank, then I click to commitment plan with ACCAssnmentCat. K and enter the data, however when I create a PO (ME21N) and want to assign the earmarked fund created by "Commitment plan within contract" I cannot find it.

Any Idea what I can do here?

thank you

entry.title: Re: Optimized Design Experience as the default for the en...
entry.content:
@Vika3 

Currently the ODE is the default option (radio button) selected when you create a new story with an option to change the radio button to classic option. As per the below blog, from 2025 Q3 release the option to choose classic option will go away and ODE will be the only and default option. Currently there is no way to prevent the choice of classic story option.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/important-notice-changes-in-sap-analytics-cloud-classic-stories-amp/ba-p/13705220

From the above blog:

" 

  • With the 2025 Q3 QRC: we will be prevent from creating new Classic Stories or Analytic Applications. It means creating a new Canvas or Responsive Page will directly create an Optimized Story. For existing assets, customers will still be able to maintain the asset. It means they can view, edit, save, share, duplicate, and delete. There will be a new configuration option for System Admins to setup up an auto deletion of assets that have not been viewed beyond a certain period.  "

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content:
@graziela - We are seeing tax refunds for the CA EE Disability tax. Upon checking, we identified that SAP is not populating the Year-to-Date wages (YW) code for the individual accumulated period wages for CA TT: 041. As a result, there is no /741 wage type in the RT, and CRT cluster tables, leading to adjustment/refunds from the previous periods:

See the below BSI interface screen shot.

Please let us know if there is any correction notes from SAP on this issue.

We are currently at HRSP SP E0, and the Tubs until 157.

entry.title: Re: Building an End-to-End RAG Application Using FastAPI on BTP Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Better later than never 😉
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/document-information-extraction/ba-p/13807463

entry.title: When is LIKP-TCODE populated with VL10X
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I would need to know when the field LIKP-TCODE for Outbound Deliveries (e.g. LF) is populated with "VL10X" instead of "VL01N".

I made some tests and seems to be related to a massive delivery creation, when multiple sales orders are included in the same delivery (using for instance t.code VL10C): is my understanding correct?

Do you know which Fiori APP are used to store value VL10X in LIKP-TCODE?

Thank you in advance,

Sonia.

Best Regards
Arvind

entry.content:

Is there a documentation or community content available for Denmark?

The “Supported Compliance Tasks by Country / Region” (Link) and S/4HANA documentation for Denmark (Link) did not explain how to achieve this for Denmark.

Josef

entry.title: Re: Address from Object Activity does not have detailed a...
entry.content: perfect thats it! Thanks Dmitry

entry.title: Re: Datasphere: Consume a Generic OData Source to Create a Fact (Analytical Dataset)
entry.content:
@merza Thanks for your blog.

I have a question regarding making connection between SAP Asset Performance Management and SAP DS. we made an Odata connection and fetch data through Data flow. but there is an issue to set variable filter for data source ( it is not possible with SQL script and in source table we can write only hard filter).
How we can set filter in this case?

Thanks in advanced

entry.title: Snowflake Will Block Single-Factor Password Authentication for Business Objects
entry.content:
Snowflake Will Block Single-Factor Password Authentication by November 2025 

 

Snowflake released this announcement Dec 01, 2024. Our DBA team has brought this to our attention that we will need to be making changes.

Has anyone else looked into this to determine what capabilities Business Objects has to accommodate this?

From a cursory look, it looks like an ODBC connection will support the key-pair authentication method but it may require a newer Snowflake driver than is currently officially supported by SAP for Business Objects.

entry.title: Display samples pulled per material
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm doing a project where I'm reducing the number of samples pulled of a certain type.

I'm wondering if there's a T-Code I can use to pull a report for each sample pulled for a material. I've been trying QA02 but that's specific to an Inspection Lot which is already released and I'm hoping to get the samples required for a material regardless of an Inspection Lot released (i.e. to display samples which aren't SAP orders etc).

I don'd mind having to manually go through each material if that's required, but if there's a way to pull in mass it would be great as I'll have about 700 to go through.

Thanks in advance,

David

entry.title: Re: disp-work, Dispatcher, GRAY, Stopped, , ,10102
entry.content:
The HANA DB isn't licensed and refuses connecting. The message is on the "dev_w0.txt" file:

C  database user=SAPHANADB
C  connection id=302615
C  *** ERROR =>   execute(), rc=1, rcSQL=437
 [dbsdbsql.cpp 850]
C  SQLCODE    : 437
C  SQLERRTEXT : only commands for license handling are allowed in current state

You need to go to SAP PORTAL and register the HANA system in order to obtain the license.

entry.title: SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management Localization: Innovations in 2502
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community!

Welcome back to the first blog post for the year 2025! This time, we bring you the latest innovations and features in localization of SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502

Here we are talking about a comprehensive solution that handles subscription and usage-based models. It provides a standardized approach to recurring billing, invoicing, tax compliance, and automation.

With each release, SAP introduces localized country/region versions and new functions to assist customers with tax compliance, billing, invoicing, automation, and streamlined processes. This not only helps reduce compliance risks and costs but also improves the sustainability of tax operations.

For example, in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502, several countries/regions and functions were delivered in the product area of SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management for localization.

Additional functions, which were not part of the roadmap, have also been delivered:

One example, from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2502 innovations, is the electronic submission of convergent invoices for Golden Tax invoice in China.

Electronic submission of convergent invoices for Golden Tax invoice in China

This video shows you how to submit invoices from convergent invoicing electronically using the integration of the golden tax interface.

 

For more information, I invite you to visit the following pages: 

  • Road Map Explorer: Future innovations planned 
  • SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management, public edition – Online Help Documentation
  • What’s New: What's New Viewer - SAP S/4HANA Cloud
  • Blog Post: SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management Localization: Sustainable Compliance for Your Recurring Revenue Business

The purpose of this post is to show you how SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management for SAP S/4HANA localization is a game-changer for businesses that are looking to streamline their financial operations while ensuring compliance with local regulations. Stay tuned for the next update!

I hope you’ve found this blog post interesting. If so, I invite you to follow my profile and the tags SAP Document and Reporting Compliance and SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management. Also, feel free to leave a comment or a suggestion in the comment section.

Thank you for choosing SAP to run your business complaint with local tax authorities!

entry.title: Creation of new vendor batch when converting a Purchase Order to an inbound delivery
entry.content:
Batch:
A batch in SAP is a unique identifier assigned to a group of products produced or received together under the same conditions. Batches are used to track products for quality control, traceability, and compliance purposes. SAP allows the management and monitoring of batch attributes like expiry dates, production dates, and specific characteristics.

 

Batch Creation:
Batch creation in SAP refers to the process of assigning a unique identifier to a group of products produced or received under similar conditions. This allows for better tracking, quality control, and traceability of goods throughout the supply chain. SAP supports batch creation during goods receipt, production, or inventory management to ensure accurate monitoring of batch-specific attributes.

 

Steps for creation of new vendor batch when converting a Purchase Order to an inbound delivery

Step1:

Create an Inbound delivery using the transaction code VL31N

 

Enter the Purchase Order details and the delivery date:

 

Step2:

Select the line item.

Enter the delivery quantity and then click on the batch creation button to create a new vendor batch.

 

Step3:

In the new dialog screen enter the details below manually:

  1. Batch
  2. Expiry date
  3. Country of origin

Then save it.

 

Step4:

The new vendor batch is created and then save the inbound delivery.

 

 

Conclusion:

Steps for creation of new vendor batch when converting a Purchase Order to an inbound delivery is provided.

entry.title: Re: Optimized Design Experience as the default for the en...
entry.content: Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Re: Equipment installation to Functional location does no...
entry.content:
Thank you for your comment,

Its a setting in Customizing that we found and allows to set a movement types for Installing/Dismantling.  

I`m still testing if there is something additional to be done and will post the solution

entry.title: Re: Question about replication flow in initial mode with the status "Retrying"
entry.content: Hello, has anyone found a solution to this issue? We have recently started encountering it as well...thanks
